ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters_total" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout_rate" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Candidate's email address */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Candidate's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., Election Day, Advanced Voting) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote result */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate using the specified method */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes the candidate received in the precinct using the specified method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: State where the county is located
Total number of registered voters in the county
Total number of votes cast in the county
